variant_name: 陆姝仪 — 胃病发作状态
trigger: 马球会休息处，胃病发作，沈词照顾

appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 病容憔悴，泪眼盈盈，痛苦隐忍的神态

visual_reference: fragile Chinese beauty in pale hanfu lying on bed, sickly pale complexion, pained expression with furrowed brows, tearful eyes, disheveled hair, weak posture, indoor dim lighting with lanterns, medicine bowl nearby, delicate suffering appearance
